summary: Concurrent OAuth token refresh with file locking and atomic config writes.
reason: Prevent duplicate token refresh calls and config file corruption under concurrent process access. Provider-revoked tokens now recover correctly on 401 via the forceRefresh path.

changes.description: Wrap refreshAccessToken in an exclusive flock on token.lock. Fix lockDir derivation (guard Path=='' before filepath.Dir). Add forceRefresh bool param: false on proactive/expiry path (short-circuit valid on-disk token), true on 401 path (always contact token endpoint to recover provider-revoked tokens). Guard bulk Config field assignments with Config.Lock/Unlock to eliminate data race.

Add TestClient_ConcurrentTokenRefresh (goroutine storm, verifies exactly one token-endpoint call) and TestClient_ForceRefreshBypassesShortCircuit (verifies forceRefresh=true contacts endpoint even when local clock shows token as valid).

Add sync.Mutex to Config struct with Lock/Unlock methods. Guard AuthHeader, SaveTokens, ClearTokens, and save (marshal step) with the mutex. Make save() atomic via write-to-temp + os.Rename. Guard save() against empty Path.
